mkdir -p /git/server /srv/git-web
if [ ! -d /git/server/objects ]; then
  git init --bare /git/server
fi
git --git-dir=/git/server symbolic-ref HEAD refs/heads/master
cat >/git/server/hooks/post-receive <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
REPO_DIR=/git/server
WEB_ROOT=/srv/git-web
BRANCH=master

while read -r oldrev newrev refname; do
  if [ "$refname" = "refs/heads/$BRANCH" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$WEB_ROOT"
    GIT_WORK_TREE="$WEB_ROOT" git --git-dir="$REPO_DIR" checkout -f "$BRANCH"
    GIT_WORK_TREE="$WEB_ROOT" git --git-dir="$REPO_DIR" clean -fdx
    echo "Deployed $newrev to $WEB_ROOT" >&2
  fi
done
EOF
chmod +x /git/server/hooks/post-receive
